title: ononis reclinata subsp. reclinata
intro: Ononis reclinata subsp. reclinata, also known as the twisted restharrow or hooked restharrow, is a perennial flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is commonly found in dry areas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating pain, and has been used to treat conditions like arthritis and wounds. Herbal preparations of Ononis reclinata subsp. reclinata can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk remedies and traditional medicine practices.
